# Summary

Describe **what** changed and **why** (1–5 bullet points).

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Screenshots / recordings (UI changes)

If this changes the dashboard UI, attach screenshots or a short recording.

## How to test

Describe the exact steps a reviewer can run.

- [ ] `py -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `make lint` (or the Windows equivalents in `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] `py ci_monitor.py collect`
- [ ] `py ci_monitor.py web` and verify `/` loads

## Risk / impact

- **User impact**:
- **Backward compatibility**:
- **Config changes**:

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed (`README.md`, `docs/USER_GUIDE.md`, `docs/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md`)
- [ ] I did not commit secrets (tokens, passwords, `.db` files)
- [ ] I kept changes scoped and easy to review
